extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY verdict of this record and on every citation of its numbers. STAND-IN, NOT THE ADJUDICATING REVIEW: the g9.review blinded-reviewer role is filled by a pinned LLM (GPT-5.6-Sol via npx-pinned codex-cli 0.144.1, reasoning effort low) because the blinded HUMAN reviewer the frozen g9 record requires (GATE-H, ~4h) is unavailable at run time; g9 (frozen_sha256 cf56c5cea66c7207cbd693914eebcf0d0244c8d5ef249f5065300eff8ab00aa8) remains FROZEN, unconsumed, and is the ONLY experiment on this line whose readout adjudicates HS-A. The composite score here IS one LLM's blind endorsement of substitutability and cross-translatability — NOT a blinded human review and NOT the published DeepNSM evaluation protocol. Binding weakenings: (1) SINGLE LLM REVIEWER — the estimand is 'GPT-5.x-family endorsement of the authored explications under blind sheet rendering', which family-level bias can inflate or deflate independent of real explication quality; there is no second reviewer; the retest floor is stability only and validates nothing in its pass direction. (2) TRADITION FAMILIARITY — the judge is kernel-instance-naive by context control but NOT NSM-tradition-naive (ASM-0552): it may endorse a familiar reductive-paraphrase STYLE rather than judge substitutability from language competence — a channel that inflates the composite rate; the deranged-explication probe bounds only its crudest form, and ONLY on the substitutability leg. (3) CROSS-TRANSLATABILITY IS THE WEAKEST LEG — it is operationalised as a judged text-intrinsic property (ASM-0521), has NO content-scramble control by construction, and is form-analogous at best to the published metric definition; its endorsement rate is disclosed per-leg so no reader can attribute composite strength to it silently. (4) SEVERITY-COMPARABILITY UNCALIBRATED (ASM-0522) — the +0.10 margin vs the published 0.24 point presumes protocol-comparable judge severity; a proxy judge's severity is unknown relative to the published evaluation, so clearing or missing the margin is form-preserving only: NEITHER outcome bears on HS-A, the why-now argument, or authoring-cost estimates in any plan document. (5) LICENSE OF A PASS — a PASS means exactly: 'a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM, under blind sheet rendering with a working escape, endorses the 50 Fable-authored explications at the frozen composite bar'. It is a WEAK FEASIBILITY PROXY (ASM-0550). It does NOT discharge g9's blinded_review_done gate, does NOT adjudicate HS-A, does NOT substitute for the GATE-H human review, does NOT license any authoring-cost claim in any prospectus or plan document, and does NOT extend to human reviewers, other authoring runs, other word sets, or any coverage-general claim (kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, restated mandatorily). (6) ASYMMETRIC READING — the named channels plausibly push endorsement UP, so FAIL-analog is the more informative outcome: it warrants pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer, while remaining formally scoped to this proxy id; a PASS licenses only continued investment (human reviewer recruitment, authoring-pipeline continuation) and never upgrades any claim. (7) Sheet bytes and the withheld-reference blinding are byte-identical to the human g9.review materials; per-sheet proxy labels are pinned so the eventual human review yields a free human-vs-proxy bias measurement (ASM-0553); nothing else carries over.
hypotheses: H-G9P-ENDORSE (the only load-bearing hypothesis, scoped to the proxy): a kernel-instance-naive cross-vendor LLM reviewer, shown ONLY the blinded sheet bytes (word, def, examples, ambig examples, proposed paraphrase; reference explications and authoring notes withheld exactly as for the human), endorses the authored explications at the frozen g9 bar: one-sided 95% Wilson LB of the composite proxy rate >= 0.34 over the 50 sheets. A PASS is a WEAK FEASIBILITY SIGNAL only; a FAIL is the g9-kill analog at this proxy id (early warning, escalate)

H-G9P-STYLE (instrument alternative, controlled): high endorsement could be NSM-style/tradition familiarity rather than content judgment; the deranged-explication probe (own-paraphrase deranged out via seed-pinned Sattolo cycle; correct substitutability answer 'no' by construction) bounds the crude form on the substitutability leg ONLY — false-endorsement >= 0.30 invalidates the instrument, never reads as a hypothesis outcome; the cross-translatability leg has NO content-scramble control by construction (text-intrinsic property; disclosed weakening)
H-G9P-STABLE (instrument floor, FAIL-direction only): 10 seed-pinned duplicate sheets re-asked; raw per-field self-agreement < 0.80 invalidates; its pass direction validates nothing (single judge)
kill_criterion_verbatim: g9-llmproxy kill (PROXY-ONLY, zero GPU, the g9.review role filled by the pinned GPT-5.6-Sol stand-in): FAIL-analog fires iff the one-sided 95% Wilson UPPER bound of the composite proxy rate < 0.34 over the labelled sheets (composite = MEASURED mechanical legality AND substitutable=yes AND cross_translatable=yes; cannot-say counts against pass; no-label leaves the denominator, capped by gate). This mirrors the frozen g9 kill ('not decisively better than DeepNSM-8B') in FORM ONLY; it can neither fire nor discharge g9's own kill, whose reviewer is a blinded HUMAN (GATE-H), and it cannot weaken or strengthen the why-now argument or revert any authoring-cost estimate — a proxy FAIL-analog warrants pausing authoring-cost claims and escalating to the maintainer, formally scoped to this proxy id. Degeneracy discipline (INSTRUMENT-INVALID, never FAIL/PASS): preflight failure; n_labelled < 45 of 50; n_nolabel > 5; retest raw agreement < 0.80; probe false-endorsement >= 0.30 or probe coverage < 45/50 (a judge endorsing substitutability of deranged paraphrases at >= 0.30 is answering from style/familiarity, and its endorsement of the real sheets cannot be read as content endorsement — exactly the channel that would fabricate a proxy-PASS).
